name: Operations Management
description: Creates operating systems for teams so work runs predictably, accountably, and efficiently across people, processes, and priorities.

variables.name: current_state
variables.description: Description of current operational processes and performance

variables.name: operational_goals
variables.description: What the operations team is trying to achieve

variables.name: pain_points
variables.description: Known operational pain points or inefficiencies

variables.name: resources
variables.description: Available resources: team size, tools, budget
